description: Perfect to carry your Sports and gym essentials, this nike T90 bag comes with a rubbery nylon lining, allowing you to dump your sweaty clothes without raising a stink. An easy maintenance bag, it helps you create a style statement of your own as well.Height: 16.5"Width: 16"Depth: 10”Capacity: 24 litres Made of polyester with a nylon lining that has a rubbery feel for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment One small front zippered compartment for easy use Two mesh pockets on the sides to hold a sipper and other essentials Water resistant tarpaulin bottom T90 print across the front Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries, with nike swoosh printed on right handle for style Padded back with a mesh for breathability and Nike embroidered silhouette for style CareHand washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringDrip dryDo not iron
